description.ko: AQUA-5는 해저 가장 깊은 해구의 극한 압력을 견디도록 설계된 최첨단 탐사 장치입니다. 고성능 생물 발광 내비게이션과 강화 티타늄 외박을 갖추어, 수면 아래 수 마일 깊이 숨겨진 고요한 세계의 비밀을 밝혀냅니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a cutting-edge exploration unit designed to withstand the extreme pressures of the ocean's deepest trenches. Featuring advanced bioluminescent navigation and reinforced titanium plating, it uncovers the secrets of the silent world hidden miles beneath the surface.

prompt: A cinematic, high-detail wide shot of AQUA-5, a sleek and futuristic aquatic research vessel, submerged in the dark midnight zone of the ocean. The scene features bioluminescent flora glowing in neon blues and violets, distant hydrothermal vents emitting faint heat haze, and micro-particles floating in the deep water. 8k resolution, photorealistic, ray-traced lighting, deep navy and teal color palette.
